texto: I know we're all addicted to our smartphones, and I'll say, if I forget my smartphone, I go home and get it. And so understanding how to integrate that technology into the driving experience, both the front seat and the passenger seat and the back seat, I think is very important.

texto: It's a marathon, not a sprint. I actually feel like I come to work stronger when I've had a little time on the weekend to step away from it and enjoy my family and other things. I come back energized. If people think they're going to work 24/7, week in and week out, they're not bringing their full strength to the table.
explicacao: Metáfora atribuída a Mary Barra: compara elementos do cotidiano para falar de passagem do tempo e prioridades. O trecho “It's a marathon, not a sprint. I actually feel like I come to work stronger when I've had a littl…” usa imagem concreta para lembrar que reflexao, work, family pedem movimento e interpretação pessoal, em tom de termino e trabalho.

I come back energized. If people think they're going to work 24/7, week in and week out, they're not bringing their full strength to the table.

texto: My senior leadership team is half people who have been at GM for a long period of time like me, and others who have joined the company within the last five years from different industries, experiences, and countries. You have a better picture of the world. The diversity of thought is where you can make better business decisions.
